name: taqwin
description: Taqwin monorepo — run frontend + backend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend-node" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend-node && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:setup: docker compose up -d db && npm run db:migrate --prefix backend-node
